title: A shrinkable label film, a shrinkable label and a method for providing a shrinkable film and a label
abstract: The invention relates to a shrink face film and a shrink label comprising said face film. According to an embodiment the shrink face film includes a first skin layer and a second skin layer comprising propylene block copolymer(s) and a first modifier; and a core layer comprising propylene terpolymer(s) and a second modifier, and wherein the first modifier and the second modifier are at least one of the following: olefinic plastomer, olefinic elastomer and ethylene-octene block copolymer. The invention further relates to a method for providing a shrink face film and a method for labelling of an item with a shrink label comprising said face film.
claims:
Claims Claims: 1 . A shrink face film for a label capable to shrink under exposure to external energy, the face film comprising a first skin layer, a second skin layer and a core layer in between the first skin layer and the second skin layer, wherein - the first skin layer and the second skin layer comprise propylene block copolymer(s) and a first modifier, and - the core layer comprises propylene terpolymer(s) and a second modifier, and wherein the first modifier and the second modifier are at least one of the following: olefinic plastomer, olefinic elastomer, and ethylene-octene block copolymer. 2. A shrink face film according to claim 1 , wherein the propylene terpolymer(s) include at least one of the following: 1 - butene/propylene/ethylene, propylene/ethylene/1-hexene and propylene/ethylene/1 -butene. 3. A shrink face film according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the core layer comprises between 50 and 90 wt.% of the propylene terpolymer(s) and total amount between 10 and 50 wt.% of the second modifier. 4. A shrink face film according to any of the claims 1 to 3, wherein the second modifier of the core layer is ethylene-octene block copolymer. 5. A shrink face film according to any of the claims 1 to 3, wherein the second modifier of the core layer is propylene-ethylene plastomer/elastomer, ethylene-octene elastomer, ethylene-butene elastomer or any combination thereof. 6. A shrink face film according to any of the previous claims, wherein the core layer further comprises heterophasic propylene-ethylene copolymer or polybutene-etylene copolymer. 7. A shrink face film according to any of the previous claims, wherein the first modifier is propylene-ethylene plastomer/elastomer, ethylene-octene elastomer, ethylene-butene elastomer or any combination thereof. 8. A shrink face film according to any of the previous claims, wherein the first skin layer and the second skin layer comprise between 70 and 99 wt.% of propylene block copolymer(s) and total amount between 1 and 30 wt.% of the first modifier. 9. A shrink face film according to any of the previous claims, wherein the face film is uniaxially oriented comprising an uniaxial orientation ratio between 2 and 10. 10. A shrink face film according to claim any of the previous claims, wherein the face film has a shrinkage at least 15%, preferably at least 25%, or at least 35% above temperature of 65 Â°C. 1 1 . A shrink label capable to shrink under exposure to external energy comprising a face film according to any of the claims 1 -10. 12. A method for manufacturing a shrink face film, - providing a multilayer face film comprising a first skin layer, a second skin layer and a core layer in between the skin layers, wherein the first skin layer and the second skin layer comprises propylene block copolymer(s) and a first modifier, and the core layer comprises propylene terpolymer(s) and a second modifier, wherein the first modifier and the second modifier are at least one of the following: olefinic plastomer, olefinic elastomer and ethylene-octene block copolymer; - stretching of the multilayer face film uniaxially at temperature between 50 and 130Â°C so as to provide an uniaxially oriented multilayer face film; - cooling the uniaxially oriented multilayer face film so as to provide shrink potential for the face film in the stretching direction. 13. A method for labelling of an item with a shrink label comprising a shrink face film according to any of the claims 1 -10: - cutting the face film into desired length of a shrink label; 

 - wrapping the cut face film around a mandrel; - seaming the cut face film around the mandrel so as to form the shrink label; - applying the shrink label around the item, wherein the uniaxial orientation direction of the multilayer face film of the shrink label is extending circumferentially around the item; and - heating the shrink label at temperature between 65 and 140 Â°C so as to form a tight fitting label around the item. 14. Use of a shrink label according to claim 1 1 for labelling of an item. 15. A combination of an item and a shrink label according to claim 1 1 , wherein the label is shrunk around the item.
